pending.body: finding_summary: The new safety gate is only checked once at the start of multi-step mutation flows, so later bead mutations can still run after `.beads/issues.jsonl` becomes conflicted or malformed. In `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:3178-3217`, `ensure_beads_mutation_health()` runs before `create_bead`, but the follow-up `add_dependency` and `sync_flush` execute without another check. In `src/cli/project.rs:965-1000`, the same pattern exists around `sync_if_dirty()`: the explicit `update --status=in_progress` and final `sync_flush` are not revalidated after the recovered flush. A concurrent `git pull`/merge between those steps defeats the intended "pre-operation safety checks" and still allows later mutations on corrupted bead state.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 12 -> Plan and Implement
